title: diervilla florida var. candida
intro: Diervilla florida var. candida, also known as the white diervilla, is a rare and lesser-known variety of the flowering plant Diervilla florida, native to North America. This shrub-like plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to treat skin conditions, wounds, and inflammation due to its rich content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The white diervilla has been used to treat a range of health issues, including eczema, acne, and dermatitis, thanks to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of Diervilla florida var. candida often involve infusions or tinctures, which can be used topically to soothe skin irritations or taken internally to support overall health and well-being.
